esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-cockroachdb.otel-default*
| WHERE service.name == "cockroachdb"
  AND rocksdb_read_amplification IS NOT NULL
  AND rocksdb_read_amplification > 50
// > 50 for sustained period indicates unhealthy LSM
| WHERE attributes.node_id IS NOT NULL AND attributes.store IS NOT NULL
| STATS amplification = MAX(rocksdb_read_amplification) BY attributes.node_id, host.name
| SORT amplification DESC
